content: k8sgpt: deterministic Kubernetes analyzers over resources (Pods, Deployments, Services, Events); LLM used only to explain findings and suggest fixes. HolmesGPT (Robusta/Microsoft, CNCF Sandbox): agentic ReAct loop over 30+ observability toolsets — iteratively fetches data, correlates, refines hypotheses; supports runbooks that codify investigation procedures for known alert patterns; positioned as incident investigator vs k8sgpt's quick health check. Key user-valued features: automated investigation of alerts, human-readable explanations, next-step suggestions, runbook integration.
